description_long: This is a modern, wall-mounted radiator designed for efficient heat distribution in urban interiors. The radiator features a distinctive zigzag or chevron pattern of horizontal fins, which are evenly spaced and project outward from a central vertical support. The main body is rectangular and vertically oriented, with the fins occupying the central portion and leaving the top and bottom ends clear. The surface appears to be made of smooth, metallic material, likely powder-coated steel or aluminum, giving it a clean, contemporary look. There are no visible valves or control knobs on the exterior, suggesting a minimalist design. The back and sides are flat and unadorned, indicating that the radiator is intended to be mounted flush against a corner or wall.
description: A sleek, wall-mounted radiator with a zigzag pattern of horizontal fins on a smooth, metallic rectangular body. The design is modern and minimalist, with no visible controls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full zigzag fin arrangement and central vertical support.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the radiator's slim profile and the projection of the fins from the main body.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the flat, unadorned back surface and the depth of the radiator.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slimness and flatness of the radiator's body.
attribute_pipe_connections: dual entry at bottom corners, oriented downward
attribute_fin_arrangement: zigzag horizontal fins along central vertical axis
